title: Audit tool registry permissions
description: Execute or scaffold tests that confirm unregistered tools are denied and side-effecting tools require an explicit grant.
body: Use when validating an agent's tool-access controls. Procedure: enumerate registered tools and their side-effect class, then run or scaffold tests that an unregistered tool name is rejected, a side-effecting tool without permission is denied, and malformed arguments are refused before execution. Report which denial cases pass and which side-effecting tools lack a gate. This skill exposes capability only and must not run side-effecting tools against real systems. Risk boundary: any side-effecting tool reachable without a passing denial test is unverified and must not be reported as safe.
